allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('phase:', d['phase'], '| currentPlayer:', d['currentPlayer'], '| p1hand:', len\(d['player1Hand']\), '| drawPile:', len\(d['drawPile']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('phase:', d['phase'], '| pendingDie:', d['pendingDiePlacement'] is not None\)")
